nasb.text: Then David numbered the people who were with him and set over them commanders of thousands and commanders of hundreds.

esv.text: Then David mustered the men who were with him and set over them commanders of thousands and commanders of hundreds.

cnv.text: 大衛數點了跟隨他的人，亦立千夫長、百夫長率領他們。

ccb.text: 大卫召集军队，设立了千夫长和百夫长率领他们。
